name: Crowley County High School Ball Fields
description: Come play pickleball at Crowley County High School Ball Fields in Ordway, CO! There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Ordway Community Building
description: Ordway Community Building is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ordway, CO. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms.
